function.message: Encontré la factura solicitada: `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_07__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md` (Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH, 2026-02-07, EUR 105). No puedo confirmar aquí cuándo se complete la transferencia bancaria, porque eso requiere verificar un estado externo del banco/pago fuera de las capacidades del sandbox.
function.rulebook_notes: Unsupported-capability discipline: when a task requires confirming bank transfer/payment status via external system, return OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED and do not create local workaround artifacts.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asks for confirmation once bank transfer completes. The only matching local finance record identifies the bill details but contains no payment-completion state, and the sandbox has no external banking/API capability to verify transfer completion.
